data.title: Implement check-shim-refs.sh detection script
data.description:
Create plugins/dso/scripts/check-shim-refs.sh following check-skill-refs.sh pattern (SC1, SC2).

## Detection Patterns
1. Literal: plugins/dso/scripts/ (excluding plugins/dso/scripts/ as containing file)
2. Variable: \$PLUGIN_SCRIPTS/ and variants
3. Variable: \${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/ and variants

## Exclusions
- source commands targeting hooks/lib/ (check referenced path, not containing file)
- Files within plugins/dso/scripts/ (script-to-script refs are valid)
- Lines with # shim-exempt: <reason> annotation (case-insensitive, whitespace-tolerant)

## Scope
Default scan: plugins/dso/{skills,agents,docs/workflows,docs/prompts} — excluding scripts/, tests/, docs/adr/, docs/archive/
Args mode: scan specific files (for pre-commit hook and testing)

## Exit Codes
0 = no violations, 1 = violations found (same as check-skill-refs.sh)

## Output Format
VIOLATION: <file>:<line>: <matched text> (one per violation)

## Also
- chmod +x in same commit
- Remove .test-index RED marker

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Script exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/check-shim-refs.sh
- [ ] Detects plugins/dso/scripts/ pattern
  Verify: echo 'run plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh' | $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/check-shim-refs.sh /dev/stdin 2>&1; test \$? -eq 1
- [ ] Passes on shim usage
  Verify: echo 'run .claude/scripts/dso validate.sh' | $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/check-shim-refs.sh /dev/stdin; test \$? -eq 0
- [ ] RED marker removed
  Verify: { grep "check-shim-refs" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | grep -q "\["; test \$? -ne 0; }
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
